gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/308)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/308)
text: الْأُسْرُبِّ يُشْتَرَى بِالْفِضَّةِ قَالَ إِنْ كَانَ الْغَالِبُ عَلَيْهِ الْأُسْرُبَّ فَلَا بَأْسَ بِهِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, and Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Al Fazl Bin Shazaan, altogether, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Abdul Rahman Bin Al Hajjaj,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding the lead (dirhams) bought with the silver (dirhams). He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘If the lead was predominant upon it, so there is no problem with it’.
en.sarwar: 15. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father and Muhammad ibn ‘Isma’il has narrated from al-Fadl ibn Shadhan from all from ibn abu ‘Umayr from ‘Abd al-Rahman ibn al-Hajjaj who has said the following: “About the case of buying al-Asrub with silver, abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘If al- Asrub is more prevalent then it is not unlawful . 555
